allow: Bash(echo "=== Section 7 de l'archi doc ===" && sed -n '/^##* *7/,/^##* *8/p' docs/CIMOLACE_ARCHITECTURE.md 2>/dev/null | head -120)

Bash(node run-sql.js --sql "SELECT to_regclass\('public.isna_pipeline_runs'\) AS isna_table, to_regclass\('public.course_pipeline_runs'\) AS course_table; SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='isna_pipeline_runs' ORDER BY ordinal_position; SELECT relname, relrowsecurity AS rls_enabled FROM pg_class WHERE relname IN \('isna_pipeline_runs','course_pipeline_runs'\); SELECT policyname, cmd, qual, with_check FROM pg_policies WHERE schemaname='public' AND tablename='isna_pipeline_runs';")
